scripts.push: git add .; git commit -m "${npm_config_message:-push}"; git push origin feature/${npm_config_name}
scripts.open: git pull origin production; git checkout -b feature/$npm_config_name
scripts.close: git pull origin production; git fetch --prune; git branch -D feature/$npm_config_name
scripts.sync: git checkout production; git pull origin production; git fetch --prune
